3130160.name: Ultra Sudoku
3130160.description: Ultimate Puzzle Challenge, where traditional Sudoku meets exciting new variations! Enjoy endless puzzles in classic 9x9 and advanced 16x16 modes, or test your skills with our unique Mix 4x9x9 and 5x9x9 boards, where multiple grids intertwine to create a brain-teasing experience.
3130160.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 波兰语, 简体中文, 土耳其语
